_comment: Auto-scraped from LinkedIn (live cookie scrape or PDF export), structured by Gemini. Edit freely — the tailor treats this as an editable source. Re-scrape with `npm run sync`.

profile.name: Sandeep Singh
profile.headline: Ex AI Engineer @AiRA | Built & Scaled Samagra to 10k+ Users | Ex-Research Intern @IIT Kharagpur | LLMs, Agentic Workflows & Fine-tuning

experience.title: AI Engineer
experience.description: At AiRA, I am building the brain of a personal AI agent. I don't just connect APIs; I solve the hard engineering problems required to make agents reliable. I architected the flagship "Daily Brief" system, a feature that digests emails, calendar events, and user preferences to deliver proactive morning updates. My focus is on production reliability and security. I solved complex distributed system challenges (like global timezone orchestration) to ensure tasks execute precisely when intended. I also worked on the implementation of CASA security standards, building token denylists in Redis and sanitizing injection vectors to make the system enterprise-ready. On the integration front, I built a deep bi-directional sync with WhatsApp, allowing the agent to understand reply contexts, monitor groups, and interact naturally - making AiRA not just a chatbot, but a proactive assistant.

experience.title: Founding Software Engineer
experience.description: At Indigle, I learned how to scale. As Co-founder & Founding Software Engineer, I architected and shipped Samagra (IndieRP), a full-stack campus ERP system that grew to 10,000+ active users. This wasn't a toy project. I built the entire infrastructure from scratch using React Native for mobile and FastAPI/Node.js for the backend. The biggest challenge was cost; I engineered a zero-cost architecture that handles 150k+ monthly API requests with sub-100ms latency. I also built real-time synchronization features (using Socket.io) that keep thousands of students updated instantly. This experience taught me how to handle production databases (MongoDB/Postgres), manage 99.9% uptime, and pivot based on real user feedback.

experience.title: AI Research Intern
experience.description: At IIT Kharagpur, I didn't just use LLMs; I optimized them. As a Research Intern, I tackled the problem of Multimodal Reasoning for IoT. Standard models like ChatGPT fail completely when asked to generate precise Arduino circuit wiring. To solve this, I built CircuitSynth. I fine-tuned open-source models (Qwen 4B/8B) using LoRA and QLoRA, creating a specialized pipeline that could "think" in hardware schematics. The result? A system that achieved 75% accuracy on tasks where base models scored 0%. This experience taught me the deep internals of Transformers, the art of efficient fine-tuning (PEFT), and how to deploy heavy models on constrained edge hardware.

experience.title: Android Lead
experience.description:
• Conducted an intensive 12-hour workshop on Android development and React Native, attended by 100+ students from diverse technical backgrounds.
• Maintained a high engagement rate with over 80% attendance retention until the end, reflecting strong delivery and content value.
• Designed a hands-on curriculum covering mobile app fundamentals, UI/UX best practices, and deployment strategies.
• Provided live coding demonstrations and one-on-one mentorship throughout the session, addressing real-time queries and project guidance.
• Organized and managed a college-wide Hackathon involving 120+ teams, overseeing event logistics, technical support, judging criteria, and sponsor coordination.
• Ensured a smooth and inclusive experience for all participants, from registration to final presentations, fostering innovation and collaboration.
